name: Will Mahoney
abstract: William James Fitzpatrick Mahoney (February 5, 1894 – February 9, 1967) was an American vaudevillian performer, stage actor and theatre manager who later had a successful stage career in Australia.

concerts.label: Benefit: Haym Solomon Home for the Aged and Infirm

about_quotes.speaker: John W. Bubbles
about_quotes.evidence: First time I'd met them, yeah. uh-hm. That's the time of whatsname back in those days, Will Mahoney and also Pat Rooney.

about_quotes.speaker: Chuck Green
about_quotes.evidence: Will Mahoney, danced on a xylophone and so forth. ... Will Mahoney was a novelty act by dancing on the marimba
